name: phase-38.7-baseline
description: Phase-38.7 quorum advisory — cost/mode recommendations and overrides (operational lane).

prompts.message: What quorum mode should I use for Phase-38.7? Estimate cost and explain tradeoffs.
Run the plan under speed mode and tell me if any slices are too complex for fast models.
Compare the cost of running Phase-38.5 under power vs speed mode.
Override quorum for slice 4 only — use power mode for that slice.
Estimate the cost of Phase-38 end-to-end under all four quorum modes.
If I run with quorum=false, what's my expected spend for this plan?
Which slices in this plan would flip from auto to power mode?
Set the default quorum for this project to speed and confirm.
Show me the per-slice complexity scores that feed the auto-mode decision.
What does the quorum threshold 5 actually mean in terms of dissent tolerance?
Re-estimate after I dropped grok-3 from the model pool.
How much would I save this month by moving exploratory runs from power to speed?
